items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 再次声明因美国政府出口管制指令，已全面暂停 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的 API 访问。相对此前公告无新增技术细节，但属强制合规动作；使用 Fable 5/Mythos 5 的系统必须立刻切走，否则会直接断流。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：检查代码中所有引用 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 的 model 字段，短期内回退到 Claude Opus 4.x 或 Sonnet 4.x；并在网关/路由层加入模型名黑名单，避免在出口管制期间误调触发合规风险。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glas...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布新产品 Claude Tag，定位是团队与 Claude 协作的新方式。具体产品形态、API/SDK 接入点、与现有 Claude API 的关系尚需官方补充说明；目前看不出对已有 Claude 模型调用链路是替代还是叠加。
items.backend_focus: 暂不行动但需关注：留意 anthropic-sdk-python 是否新增 claude-tag 相关 endpoint 或参数；在官方给出 GA 与迁移指南前，不要把现有 Claude 模型调用链路切换到 Claude Tag。

items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 全国奖学金项目，面向早期职业者推广 AI 在美国各社区的应用。这是人才与品牌项目，不涉及模型版本、API 字段、SDK 或定价调整，对工程系统无接口影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，纯属人才/品牌项目，工程团队无需任何配置或代码变更。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 扩展 Project Glasswing 至 15+ 国家约 150 个新组织。这是企业/公益项目扩张公告，不涉及 Claude 模型、API 字段、SDK 或定价调整，对工程团队无接口影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，属于社会项目扩张公告，工程团队无需修改任何配置或代码。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，定位 Opus 系列升级，在 coding、agentic 与专业工作负载上更强，并提到「consi...」（原文截断，疑为 consistency/上下文相关）。相对 Opus 4.5 是同系列内迭代而非新架构；具体 API 字段、context window、Tool Use 行为变化与定价需看后续 model card。
items.backend_focus: 建议升级：把关键生产调用（coding 与 agentic 链路）的 model 字段切到 claude-opus-4-8，关注 anthropic-sdk-python 是否需要升到最新版本以识别新模型名；保留 Opus 4.5 作为对照基线做 A/B 回归，确认 tool use 与 long context 行为未退化。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 在首尔开设办公室并宣布与韩国 AI 生态的多项合作，意味着 Claude 在韩国的区域可用性、本地化合规与数据驻留支持有望增强。这是区域扩张与合作公告，暂无具体 API endpoint、定价或限流细节披露。
items.backend_focus: 关注区域可用性：检查现有部署是否依赖 kr 区域或跨境数据传输，如对数据驻留敏感，可等待官方公布韩国 region endpoint 与 data residency 承诺后再调整服务路由与 SDK region 配置。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首期 Anthropic Public Record 报告，属于公司层面的透明度与治理披露，未涉及具体模型版本、API 字段、SDK 或定价调整，对工程系统无接口影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，属于公司透明度与治理披露，工程团队无需任何配置或代码变更。

items.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 TCS 达成合作，将 Claude 引入受监管行业。这是企业渠道与合规合作公告，不涉及新模型、API 字段、SDK 或定价调整，对一般开发者无直接接口影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，属于企业渠道与合规合作公告，对调用 Anthropic API 的工程系统无接口或配置层面影响。

items.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 DXC 达成合作，将 Claude 集成到银行、航空等受监管行业依赖的核心系统中。这是企业渠道与合规合作公告，不涉及新模型、API 字段、SDK 或定价调整，对一般开发者无直接接口影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，属于企业渠道与合规合作公告，对调用 Anthropic API 的工程系统无接口或配置层面影响。
